ScriptHookVDotNet (vendored)
============================

This folder contains a **nightly** build of Community Script Hook V .NET,
redistributed under its zlib license (see README.txt / Licenses in the zip).

Source (nightly mirror — required for modern GTA builds such as 3788):
  https://github.com/scripthookvdotnet/scripthookvdotnet-nightly/releases

Do NOT use the ancient stable v3.6.0 from the main repo for current game
patches; it will crash when entering Story Mode.

NOT included (must be installed manually — redistribution not allowed here):

  ScriptHookV by Alexander Blade
  http://www.dev-c.com/gtav/scripthookv/

ScriptHookV build must match your GTA V game version.
